[Congressional Bills 105th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 36 Engrossed in House (EH)]


                 In the House of Representatives, U.S.,

                                                      February 5, 1997.
    Resolved, That the following named Members be, and that they are hereby, 
elected to the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:
    Committee on Agriculture: Mr. Johnson of Wisconsin and Mr. Boswell.
    Committee on the Budget: Mrs. Clayton.
    Committee on Government Reform and Oversight: Mr. Davis of Illinois, Mr. 
Tierney, Mr. Turner, and Mr. Allen.
    Committee on House Oversight: Mr. Hoyer and Ms. Kilpatrick.
    Committee on International Relations: Mr. Clement.
    Committee on National Security: Ms. Sanchez, Mr. Maloney of Connecticut, and 
Mr. McIntyre.
    Committee on Resources: Mr. Lampson.
    Committee on Small Business: Mr. LaFalce, Mr. Skelton, Mr. Sisisky, Mr. 
Flake, Mr. Poshard, Mr. Meehan, Ms. Velazquez, Mr. Luther, Mr. Baldacci, Mr. 
Jackson of Illinois, Ms. Millender-McDonald, Mr. Boyd, Ms. McCarthy of New York, 
Mr. Pascrell, and Mr. Goode.
    Committee on Veterans' Affairs: Mr. Evans, Mr. Kennedy of Massachusetts, Mr. 
Filner, Mr. Guiterrez, Mr. Baesler, Mr. Bishop, Mr. Clyburn, Ms. Brown, Mr. 
Doyle, Mr. Mascara, Mr. Peterson of Minnesota, Mrs. Carson, Mr. Reyes, and Mr. 
Snyder.
            Attest:

                                                                          Clerk.
